project_type: TypeScript pnpm monorepo (9 apps, ~50 packages, 18 services) with Turborepo
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + Turborepo 2.x. turbo.json defines tasks: lint, typecheck (depends on ^build), test (depends on ^build), build (depends on ^build, outputs dist/). Workspace is pnpm-workspace.yaml with globs: apps/*, packages/*, services/*
test_framework: vitest 2.x with vitest.config.ts per package. Tests in src/__tests__/ or src/services/__tests__/. Test script: vitest run --passWithNoTests
verification_instructions: Run all 6 gates in order: 1) pnpm install --frozen-lockfile, 2) pnpm typecheck, 3) pnpm test, 4) pnpm build, 5) pnpm lint, 6) pnpm audit --audit-level=high
setup_instructions: pnpm install (no frozen lockfile needed when adding deps). Node 22+ required.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET: full npm registry access. No Docker daemon available in sandbox for docker build validation.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits. Max 500 LOC per PR (excluding generated code/deletions). All 6 gates must pass. Delete what you replace.
key_patterns: Services have package.json with typecheck/test/lint/build scripts. Payment services export classes + Zod schemas from index.ts. Tests use vitest describe/it/expect. tsconfig uses strict, composite, noUnusedLocals/Parameters, noUncheckedIndexedAccess.
directory_structure: Root: apps/ (13 Next.js/React apps), packages/ (~50 shared libs), services/ (18 microservices, 10 are stubs to delete, 8 to keep), infra/ (helm charts, prometheus, otel), .agents/ (autonomous tracking state)
